question.content: For the FET amplifier, use the transfer characteristic to find Q point and then compute Au, Ri, and Ro. Output exactly six comma-separated values in the order UGSQ_V,IDQ_mA,UDSQ_V,Au,Ri,Ro_kOhm; use INF for infinity when needed; plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Read IDQ from transfer curve at the given gate-source bias and compute UDSQ from load relation.
step_1.key_point: IDQ from transfer curve at the given gate-source bias.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for Au.

step_5.content: Compute gm and then Au, Ri, Ro; output with INF where applicable.
step_5.key_point: From gm, compute Au, Ri, and Ro.
